package rulefixtures

// scenario for read_then_decode_duplicate_materialization: io.ReadAll(...) materializes a payload and the same binding is then unmarshaled again instead of using a streaming decode path.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule359NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario359Negative(records []Rule359NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
